chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1167 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on o/objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.4540/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 17.09.2025 Mr. Noor Hassan Malik, Advocate for respondent N.13. Mr. Sharyar Awan, Assistant Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The record reflects that on 29.3.2025, counsel for the petitioner was directed to satisfy the Court regarding the maintainability of the petition in view of the cases Syed Nazir Gillani vs. Pakistant Red Crescent Society and another (2014 SCMR 982) and Muhammad Nawaz vs. Ministry of Health through Secretary, Islamabad and another (2012 P.Cr.L.J (C.S) 328). The matter was adjourned to 27.05.2025. On the said date, no one appeared on behalf of the petitioner. Subsequently, on 27.08.2025, an urgency application was filed by the counsel for the petitioner, same was dismissed. Today, Mr. Abdul Sattar Mahesar, Advocate holding brief on behalf of Mr. Abdul Qayyum Arain, Advocate for the petitioner, on the ground that latter is unwell. This conduct reflects that the petitioner has no interest in pursuing the matter. Accordingly, the instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
